    <item>
        <guid>nba530501</guid>
        <title>Victor Wembanyama: Erupts for 39 points with 15 boards</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/victor-wembanyama-5809</link>
        <description>Wembanyama chipped in 39 points (13-18 FG, 3-5 3Pt, 10-12 FT), 15 rebounds, one assist, five blocks and one steal across 37 minutes during Friday's 115-108 victory over Minnesota in Game 3 of the Western Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 08 May 2026 10:03:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530502</guid>
        <title>Anthony Edwards: Double-double in Game 3 loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/anthony-edwards-5110</link>
        <description>Edwards finished Friday's 115-108 loss to San Antonio in Game 3 of the Western Conference Semifinals with 32 points (12-26 FG, 3-9 3Pt, 5-6 FT), 14 rebounds, six assists and one block in 41 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 08 May 2026 10:03:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530499</guid>
        <title>Stephon Castle: Double-doubles in Game 3 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/stephon-castle-6250</link>
        <description>Castle posted 13 points (3-11 FG, 1-3 3Pt, 6-8 FT), four rebounds and 12 assists across 40 minutes during Friday's 115-108 victory over the Timberwolves in Game 3 of the Western Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 08 May 2026 10:00:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530497</guid>
        <title>Jalen Brunson: Leads all scorers Friday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-brunson-4405</link>
        <description>Brunson finished with 33 points (11-22 FG, 3-8 3Pt, 8-9 FT), five rebounds and nine assists across 38 minutes in Friday's 108-94 win over Philadelphia in Game 3 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 08 May 2026 7:09:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530495</guid>
        <title>Anthony Edwards: Starting in Game 3</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/anthony-edwards-5110</link>
        <description>Edwards is in the starting lineup for Friday's Game 3 of the Western Conference Semifinals versus the Spurs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 08 May 2026 6:08:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
